title: Russia is providing Iran intelligence to target U.S. forces, officials say
summary_full: The targeting information has included the locations of American warships and aircraft in the Middle East, the officials said.
summary_public: The targeting information has included the locations of American warships and aircraft in the Middle East, the officials said.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Russia is providing Iran intelligence to target U.S. forces
